description_long: This is a detailed wooden canoe sculpture featuring three human figures, each engaged in paddling or sitting. The canoe is elongated and narrow, with a gently curved hull and pointed ends, typical of traditional canoes. The figures are dressed in simple attire, with one wearing a wide-brimmed hat, and are positioned to suggest active rowing and navigation. The canoe is filled with rounded objects resembling gourds or cargo, adding to the sense of a journey or transport. The wood is polished and finished in warm brown and yellowish tones, giving the piece a handcrafted, artisanal appearance. The overall impression is one of movement and purpose, capturing a moment of river travel.
description: A handcrafted wooden canoe with three human figures paddling and carrying cargo, finished in warm brown and yellow hues.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three figures aligned in the canoe, with the foremost figure standing and the others seated behind.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the canoe, all three figures, and the cargo distributed along the hull.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the seated figure with a hat and the arrangement of the figures in a line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the figures and cargo from the other side of the canoe.
